summary: Alley Boss, a popular streamer, receives a tip-off about corruption within the 'Big Stars' esports organization, where pro players are being forced to work as drivers and are being underpaid. He orchestrates a live stream with an expert guest to expose these unethical practices while carefully guiding public opinion to identify the guilty team. Following the public outcry, the organization faces a crisis, leading to the forced sale of the team. Meanwhile, Alley Boss focuses on his personal life and his marionette companion, Tangy, who is preparing for an important awakening.
key_moments: Alley Boss receives incriminating documents regarding esports corruption and plans a stream to expose the perpetrators.
Alley Boss hosts a live stream with a former driver to confirm that 'Big Stars' is exploiting its professional players.
The public backlash causes the 'Big Stars' organization to collapse, and Alley Boss turns his attention to training Tangy for an upcoming awakening.
